text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Daiwa Scarlet goes to watch the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, she can't shake the feeling that
Vodka's stirring performance has made her
number one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A brilliant flame burns in Daiwa Scarlet's eyes.
She means to take the number one spot back
from Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Shuka Sho, the last race of the
Triple Tiara.
